title: Ceradenia fendleri
taxonomy: Ceradenia fendleri belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody fern family. This classification is due to its characteristics as a vascular plant, specifically a type of fern. It is also classified within the genus Ceradenia, which is a part of the larger division Pteridophyta, or ferns. Ceradenia fendleri has been further divided into various species due to the presence of distinguishing features. The specific classification of Ceradenia fendleri continues to be studied in the field of botany.
